attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT W_DRVD.ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY, 
       W_DRVD.SK_RECORD_NUMBER_INT, 
	   W_DRVD.SK_SEQUENCE_NUMBER_INT, 
	   W_DRVD.BK_SALES_REP_NUMBER, 
	   W_DRVD.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE, 
	   W_DRVD.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE, 
	   W_DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_DATE, 
	   W_DRVD.EXTENDED_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT, 
	   W_DRVD.EXTENDED_COST_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT, 
	   W_DRVD.EXTENDED_NET_PRICE_USD_AMOUNT, 
	   W_DRVD.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE, 
	   W_DRVD.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
	   W_DRVD.DISTRIBUTOR_OFFSET_FLAG, 
	   W_DRVD.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, 
	   W_DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_CODE, 
	   W_DRVD.DESCRIPTION, 
	   W_DRVD.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE, 
	   W_DRVD.SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE, 
	   W_DRVD.CHANNEL_BOOKING_FLAG, 
	   W_DRVD.SALES_ADJUSTMENT_DATETIME, 
	   W_DRVD.SERVICE_BOOKING_FLAG, 
	   W_DRVD.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE, 
	   W_DRVD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT, 
	   W_DRVD.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
	   W_DRVD.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT, 
	   W_DRVD.PRODUCT_KEY, 
	   W_DRVD.PROCESS_DATE, 
	   W_DRVD.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
	   W_DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	   W_DRVD.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
	   W_DRVD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
	   W_DRVD.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG, 
	   W_DRVD.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG, 
	   W_DRVD.DV_CORPORATE_BOOKING_FLG, 
	   W_DRVD.ADJUSTMENT_QTY, 
	   W_DRVD.DV_LATEST_FLG, 
	   W_DRVD.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, 
	   W_DRVD.TOP_SKU_ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY, 
	   W_DRVD.ATTRIBUTION_TYPE_CD, 
	   W_DRVD.POS_OFFSET_FLG, 
	   W_DRVD.NET_CHANGE_PROCESS_DT ,
	   W_DRVD.SK_TRX_SALES_CREDIT_ID_INT,
	   /*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/
		W_DRVD.DSV_OR_POS_TYPE_CD  ,
		W_DRVD.POS_RETURN_ROLE
		/*ADDED AS PART OF DSV Q1FY16*/	
		,W_DRVD.DV_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
		,W_DRVD.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT
		,W_DRVD.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
		,W_DRVD.POB_TYPE_CD
 /* ADDED AS PART OF JUNE 2018 RELEASE AMY-NRT SCOPE*/
  ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM
  ,RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM
  ,DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
  --,DRVD_POS.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION
  ,DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG
  ,DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
  ,DV_MULTI_YEAR_US_NET_AMT
  ,-999 AS POS_ANNUALIZED_BKG_TRX_KEY
  ,'N' AS TRANSACTIONAL_ACV_FLG
  ,'N' AS HISTORY_FLG
  ,'N' AS ANNUAL_FLG
  ,0.00 AS ORIG_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMT
  ,0.00 AS ORIG_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
  ,0.00 AS ORIG_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
  ,0.00 AS DV_RUNNING_TOTAL_USD_AMT
  ,0.00 AS DV_ORDER_VALUE_USD_AMT
  ,W_DRVD.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD
 ,W_DRVD.DV_GLOB_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT  /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
,W_DRVD.DV_GLOB_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT   /*added as part of FLEXI_AUG_REL rampusul */
   /* added below columns as part of AI Bookings Scope */
, W_DRVD.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
, W_DRVD.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
, W_DRVD.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,  W_DRVD.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME

 , LINKED_ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY AS LINKED_ALLOCATED_POS_ADJ_KEY FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_DRVD_SCA_POS_ADJ_DETAILS W_DRVD
